name: Meat Loaf Cordon Bleu
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch green onions (include green tops), chopped
2 ounces prosciutto or other smoked ham, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat eggs in a large bowl.
3. Add parsley, bread crumbs, chicken broth, garlic, salt, tarragon, mustard, and pepper to the egg mixture. Beat well.
4. Mix in ground beef. Set aside.
5. Melt butter in a pan over medium heat. Sauté onions until soft.
6. In a separate bowl, combine cheese, ham, remaining parsley, and onions. Mix well.
7. Divide the meat mixture into two equal parts.
8. Pat one part into the stoneware loaf pan to form a layer. Top with the cheese mixture.
9. Pat the remaining meat mixture on top of the cheese.
10. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
11. Remove the stoneware loaf pan from the oven and let drain off excess fat.
12. Continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
13. Let cool in the stoneware loaf pan for 15 minutes, then remove and allow to cool completely in the refrigerator.
14. Slice into thin pieces for sandwiches. Can also be served hot.
